positive: A whimsical, highly stylized forest scene featuring geometric woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls) integrated with stylized floral patterns and minimalist abstract elements. The design must feature a strong, cohesive silhouette against a negative space background, allowing for excellent printing on clothing. Use a limited, nature-inspired color palette: deep forest green, burnt orange, muted sapphire blue, and cream. The composition should be centralized and circular, suitable for a large print area. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau linework and modern geometric illustration, with clean, thick lines and high contrast. Perfect for a repeating or singular placement on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, ugly, watermark, text, signature, logos, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, photographic, realistic, jpeg artifacts
